_comment: Maps pre-April-2017 CFPB labels to their post-2017 canonical forms. Apply this before any training or evaluation. See blogs/04_the_label_problem.md for context.
Charged fees or interest I didn't expect: Charged fees or interest you didn't expect
Dealing with my lender or servicer: Dealing with your lender or servicer
Received a loan I didn't apply for: Received a loan you didn't apply for
Problems caused by my funds being low: Problem caused by your funds being low
Can't stop charges to bank account: Can't stop withdrawals from your bank account
Cont'd attempts collect debt not owed: Attempts to collect debt not owed
Unable to get credit report/credit score: Unable to get your credit report or credit score
Credit monitoring or identity protection: Credit monitoring or identity theft protection services
Was approved for a loan, but didn't rece: Was approved for a loan, but didn't receive the money
Applied for loan/did not receive money: Was approved for a loan, but didn't receive the money
Problem with a company's investigation i: Problem with a credit reporting company's investigation into an existing problem
Lender repossessed or sold the vehicle: Vehicle was repossessed or sold the vehicle
Managing, opening, or closing account: Managing, opening, or closing your mobile wallet account
